basic.name: Chongtian (Tony) Gao
basic.job: Software Quality Engineer | IT Business Analyst - Oil & Gas
basic.summary: Senior SDET specializing in desktop and SaaS testing, with extensive Oil & Gas domain knowledge and strong IT Business Analysis experience, including deep expertise in land systems.

experiences.title: Application Analyst | IT Business Analyst
experiences.details: Supported end-to-end Land system operations by gathering requirements, managing Oracle EBS integrations, resolving production issues, performing complex SQL analysis, and leading UAT, data conversions, and compliance activities.

experiences.title: Software Quality Engineer
experiences.details: Senior SDET specializing in automation-first QA, CI/CD modernization, and deep cross-layer testing (UI, API, DB), delivering major reductions in regression effort and build times across enterprise applications.

experiences.title: Software Quality Analyst
experiences.details: Owned end-to-end quality strategy for enterprise applications by combining scalable automation with targeted exploratory and manual testing, integrating BDD-driven testing into CI/CD pipelines to reduce defects, accelerate releases, and ensure high-confidence validation across complex systems.

education.title: Master of Statistics
education.details: Completed graduate-level coursework in Statistics at Rice University, including machine learning, linear regression, data visualization, and core statistical theory.

education.title: Master of Science in Biochemistry
education.details: Research on protein interactions, focusing on data analysis, validation, and modeling of complex systems.

education.title: Bachelor of Science in Biotechnology
education.details: Graduation thesis in bioinformatics using algorithms to predict RNA hairpin structures, strengthening logical modeling and data‑driven analysis skills.
